//: Copy the SessionStart hook below into your PROJECT's .claude/settings.json (merge with any existing settings). It runs in every Claude Code session — local and cloud — so a fresh cloud container has your test tooling installed before the pipeline runs. Trim the command to match your stack; keep it fast and idempotent. Use $CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE=true inside the command if you want to install deps only in the cloud.

hooks.command: if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi; if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then pip install -e '.[dev]' 2>/dev/null || pip install -e . 2>/dev/null; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then npm install; fi; true
